data.biography: 徐佳琦，中国内地女性配音演员，毕业于吉林艺术学院配音班，729声工场成员。

data.biography: 徐佳琦，中國內地女性配音演員，畢業於吉林藝術學院配音班，729 聲工場成員。
data.name: 徐佳琦

data.original_title: からかい上手の高木さん
data.overview: Bản điện ảnh từ loạt truyện manga cùng tên, vốn gây ấn tượng với độc giả về những trò nghịch ngợm tuổi học trò của Takagi và cậu bạn Nishikita. Lấy bối cảnh 10 năm sau khi cả hai đã trưởng thành, bộ đôi Takagi - Nishikata sẽ có màn thả thính cực ngọt cùng lời tỏ tình vụng dại hứa hẹn làm xiêu lòng khán giả ngay trên màn ảnh rộng.
data.title: Nhất Quỷ Nhì Ma, Thứ Ba Takagi: Trêu Rồi Yêu

data.biography: Leo Martin Bill is an English actor, best known for his role as James Brocklebank in the 2006 film The Living and the Dead, as well as The Fall, Alice in Wonderland, and the FX/BBC One drama series Taboo. He is son of actors Sheila Kelley and Stephen Bill.
data.name: Leo Bill

data.biography: 里奥·马丁·比尔 （Leo Martin Bill） 是一位英国演员

data.biography: 里奧·馬丁·比爾 （Leo Martin Bill） 是一位英國演員

data.biography: Sung Dong-il is a South Korean actor. Sung made his acting debut in theater in 1987, then was recruited at the 1991 SBS open talent auditions.
data.name: Sung Dong-il

data.biography: 成東鎰（성동일，Sung Dong-il），韓國男演員，常見譯名為成東日。1991年SBS第1期公開招募演員。1985年即入門演藝圈，1991年加入SBS演藝人才第一期培訓班，開始了其電視生涯。
data.name: 成東鎰

data.biography: “红袜子”成东日1985年即入门演艺圈，1991年加入SBS 演艺人才第一期培训班开始了电视生涯，出演了《蜗牛》、《骑自行车的女子》、《野人时代》、《我跑》、《巴黎恋人》、《绿蔷薇》等多部优秀剧集，凭借坚持和钻研演技的毅力一步步成为明星，尤其是在1999年播出的SBS电视剧《银实》中，成东日扮演的穿红袜子的剧场流氓杨正八让韩国观众掉进了爆笑的旋涡之中，他也从此之后都被亲切地称为“红袜子”成东日。1995年他在SBS《骑自行车的女人》时遇见了舞蹈家李贤淑，倾心于其跳舞的样子而展开了坚持不懈的追求，最终在2001年二人步入了婚约的殿堂，此后德成东日工作也更加努力，是演艺圈中孝顺儿子和顾家丈夫的代表。2006年他在电影《丑女大翻身》中和朱镇模费尽心思将金雅中包装成为性感女歌手，再次展现了自己的喜剧天分而博得了观众们的掌声。
data.name: 成东日

data.biography: “紅襪子”成東日 1985 年即入門演藝圈，1991 年加入 SBS 演藝人才第一期培訓班開始了電視生涯，出演了《蝸牛》、《騎腳踏車的女子》、《野人時代》、《我跑》、《巴黎戀人》、《綠薔薇》等多部優秀劇集，憑藉堅持和鑽研演技的毅力一步步成為明星，尤其是在 1999 年播出的 SBS 電視劇《銀實》中，成東日扮演的穿紅襪子的劇場流氓楊正八讓韓國觀眾掉進了爆笑的旋渦之中，他也從此之後都被親切地稱為“紅襪子”成東日。1995 年他在 SBS《騎腳踏車的女人》時遇見了舞蹈家李賢淑，傾心於其跳舞的樣子而展開了堅持不懈的追求，最終在 2001 年二人步入了婚約的殿堂，此後德成東日工作也更加努力，是演藝圈中孝順兒子和顧家丈夫的代表。2006 年他在電影《醜女大翻身》中和朱鎮模費盡心思將金雅中包裝成為性感女歌手，再次展現了自己的喜劇天分而博得了觀眾們的掌聲。
data.name: 成東日

data.biography: Gao Yuanyuan (高圆圆; born 5 October 1979) is a Chinese actress and model.
data.name: Gao Yuanyuan

data.biography:
高圆圆，1979年10月5日出生于北京市，中国内地影视女演员、模特。

1996年，高圆圆被广告公司发掘，随后拍摄大量的商业广告，在广告圈中崭露头。1997年，主演了个人首部大银幕作品《爱情麻辣烫》，从此开始了她的演艺生涯。2003年，凭借古装武侠爱情剧《倚天屠龙记》受到广泛关注[3]  。2005年，因在剧情片《青红》中饰演女主人公青红入围戛纳电影节最佳女主角奖。2006年，凭借喜剧动作片《宝贝计划》入围百花奖最佳女演员提名。2007年因在爱情电影《男才女貌》中饰演聋哑幼师秦小悠获得第11届电影表演艺术学会奖新人奖。

2010年，凭借都市爱情电影《单身男女》提名第31届香港电影金像奖最佳女主角、华语电影传媒大奖观众票选最受瞩目女演员。2013年，高圆圆主演的当代都市情感剧《咱们结婚吧》取得了同时段电视剧收视冠军，而其亦获得第十八届北京影视春燕奖最佳女主角奖。2014年，凭借爱情电影《一生一世》入围第6届澳门国际电影节最佳女主角。2015年获得第52届韩国电影大钟奖最佳海外女演员奖。2017年，主演警匪电影《风林火山》。
data.name: 高圆圆

data.biography:
高圓圓，1979 年 10 月 5 日出生於北京市，中國內地影視女演員、模特。

1996 年，高圓圓被廣告公司發掘，隨後拍攝大量的商業廣告，在廣告圈中嶄露頭。1997 年，主演了個人首部大銀幕作品《愛情麻辣燙》，從此開始了她的演藝生涯。2003 年，憑藉古裝武俠愛情劇《倚天屠龍記》受到廣泛關注 。2005 年，因在劇情片《青紅》中飾演女主人公青紅入圍戛納電影節最佳女主角獎。2006 年，憑藉喜劇動作片《寶貝計劃》入圍百花獎最佳女演員提名。2007 年因在愛情電影《男才女貌》中飾演聾啞幼師秦小悠獲得第 11 屆電影表演藝術學會獎新人獎。

2010 年，憑藉都市愛情電影《單身男女》提名第 31 屆香港電影金像獎最佳女主角、華語電影傳媒大獎觀眾票選最受矚目女演員。2013 年，高圓圓主演的當代都市情感劇《咱們結婚吧》取得了同時段電視劇收視冠軍，而其亦獲得第十八屆北京影視春燕獎最佳女主角獎。2014 年，憑藉愛情電影《一生一世》入圍第 6 屆澳門國際電影節最佳女主角。2015 年獲得第 52 屆韓國電影大鐘獎最佳海外女演員獎。2017 年，主演警匪電影《風林火山》。
data.name: 高圓圓

data.biography: 林盛斌，曾經新城電台及電視節目主持、唱片騎師，現為無綫電視基本藝人合約藝員，曾主持節目《新香蕉俱樂部》。他於 2012 年加盟無綫電視，首個主持的 TVB 電視遊戲節目是《登登登對》，亦經常演出及主持電視節目，並將電台工作當成副職，極少出現在《新香蕉俱樂部》。
data.name: 林盛斌
2 Ngày 1 Đêm
data.overview: 2 Ngày 1 Đêm là chương trình truyền hình thực tế tạp kỹ của Hàn Quốc với phương châm "con đường hoang dã thực sự đa dạng". Ý tưởng chính của nó là giới thiệu nhiều địa điểm yêu thích khác nhau mà người xem có thể ghé thăm ở Hàn Quốc.

data.name: Thiếu Niên Ca Hành: Thiên Hạ Vô Song
data.overview: Câu chuyện theo chân Vị Quy – thiếu niên mất trí nhớ mang mối thù diệt môn – cùng Lôi Linh Trạch và Hoa Tiểu Hoa trên hành trình truy tìm Thiên Trảm Kiếm, đối đầu thế lực ma đạo Thiên Ngoại Thiên, qua đó khắc họa một giang hồ đầy biến động nơi tình bạn, niềm tin và tinh thần hiệp nghĩa quyết định ai mới là “đệ nhất thiên hạ”.

data.biography:
Quốc Trọng (b. Trần Quốc Trọng, Hanoi) is a Vietnamese film actor and director. A graduate from the second acting class of the University of Theater and Performing Arts of Hanoi, he began working as an actor of the Vietnam Feature Film Studio, appearing in films since the late 70s.

Before becoming famous nationwide for his role as "Red-haired" Xuan in the adapted series "Dumb Luck" (Số Đỏ, 1990), Quốc Trọng had participated in many films, leaving the strongest impression through these roles: Long in "The Story of Coconut Village" (Câu chuyện làng dừa, 1977, d. Bạch Diệp), the young soldier in "Town within reach" (Thị xã trong tầm tay, 1983, d. Đặng Nhật Minh), Lê Văn Bờ in the TV series "Crime and Passion" (Tội và tình, d. Châu Huế), Thằng in "The Storm" (Giông tố, 1990, d. Nguyễn Mạnh Lân), Triều in "The Curse of the River" (Lời nguyền của dòng sông, 1992, d. Khải Hưng)...
data.name: Quốc Trọng

data.overview: Sau khi Tần Thuỷ Hoàng đã thống nhất 6 nước, màn tái ngộ sau nhiều thập kỷ và cuộc xuyên không đi vào lịch sử hứa hẹn sẽ tạo nên cơn địa chấn tại rạp Việt. Một án oan từ nhiều năm trước đã châm ngòi cho cuộc khủng hoảng làm thay đổi vận mệnh lịch sử! Ken (do Miêu Kiều Vĩ thủ vai) thề sẽ xuyên không trở về thời nhà Tần để xưng vương, bù đắp cho cuộc đời đã bị cướp mất vì oan ngục. Ở thời Tần, gia đình Hạng Thiếu Long (do Cổ Thiên Lạc thủ vai) tuy đã lui về ẩn cư, nhưng mọi hành động vẫn không thể qua mắt đồ đệ của mình – Tần Vương (do Lâm Phong thủ vai). Đúng lúc Tần Vương tưởng rằng mình đã thống nhất lục quốc, xưng bá thiên hạ, thì bất ngờ đối mặt với cuộc tập kích của Ken.
data.title: Tầm Tần Ký

data.biography:
董浩，1956年出生于北京市海淀区，祖籍河北省唐山市丰润区，毕业于首都师范大学本科。主持人、画家，中国宋庆龄基金会理事、北京国画艺术家协会副会长。

1977年起在北京人民广播电台作播音员，为多部中外影片的男主角配音，1980年为《铁臂阿童木》、1986年为《米老鼠和唐老鸭》配音，1989年起主持少儿节目，先后主持《天地之间》《大风车》《芝麻开门》等，2005年获得央视十佳主持人，2009年获 “金话筒奖"主持人奖，2007年，主持《天天美食》。2003年出版书籍《故事人生》，2012年出版《有画浩说》，2014年出版《不吐不快》。

2016年1月7日，董浩在微博发文宣布退休 。
data.name: 董浩

data.biography:
董浩，1956 年出生於北京市海澱區，祖籍河北省唐山市豐潤區，畢業於首都師範大學本科。主持人、畫家，中國宋慶齡基金會理事、北京國畫藝術家協會副會長。

1977 年起在北京人民廣播電台作播音員，為多部中外影片的男主角配音，1980 年為《鐵臂阿童木》、1986 年為《米老鼠和唐老鴨》配音，1989 年起主持少兒節目，先後主持《天地之間》《大風車》《芝麻開門》等，2005 年獲得央視十佳主持人，2009 年獲 “金話筒獎"主持人獎，2007 年，主持《天天美食》。2003 年出版書籍《故事人生》，2012 年出版《有畫浩説》，2014 年出版《不吐不快》。

2016 年 1 月 7 日，董浩在微博發文宣佈退休 。
data.name: 董浩

data.biography: Italian/Australian actress best known for her roles in Kate McKinnon's 'Joe vs Carole' for NBC Universal starring as Lauren Lowe opposite Dean Winters and John Cameron Mitchell (2022), ABC's 'Darby & Joan' as Maddie starring opposite Bryan Brown and Greta Scacchi (2022) for her role in Apple TV's 'Perfect Messy Holiday' (2021), her lead role of Cassie in Webseries 'The Lost History Museum' (2023) and for her recent leading role of Olly in short film DOA (2024). Aliandra was named one of the top 5 up-and-coming young Australian actors by The Courier Mail in 2024.
data.name: Aliandra Calabrese

data.biography: Araya Alberta Hargate (Thai: อารยา อัลเบอร์ตา ฮาร์เกท; born June 28, 1981), better known as Chompoo, is a Thai actress, model, host, TV personality and cover girl of British descent. Her most notable achievement is her role in Doksom Sithong. She is of English, Lao and Thai descent.
data.name: Araya A. Hargate

data.biography: 阿拉亚·艾伯塔·哈盖特（泰语：อารยา อัลเบอร์ตา ฮาร์เกท;生于1981年6月28日），更广为人知的名字是Chompoo，是泰国女演员、模特、主持人、电视名人和英国血统的封面女郎。她最显着的成就是她在 Doksom Sithong 中的角色。她有英国、老挝和泰国血统。

data.biography: 阿拉亞·艾伯塔·哈蓋特（泰語：อารยา อัลเบอร์ตา ฮาร์เกท; 生於 1981 年 6 月 28 日），更廣為人知的名字是 Chompoo，是泰國女演員、模特、主持人、電視名人和英國血統的封面女郎。她最顯著的成就是她在 Doksom Sithong 中的角色。她有英國、寮國和泰國血統。
data.name: 阿拉亞 A. 哈蓋特

data.biography: Geoffrey Giuliano został zawodowym aktorem w wieku dwunastu lat. Zdobywając stopień magistra w dziedzinie aktorstwa / reżyserii w 1976 roku Giuliano kontynuował pracę w teatrze, a także robił dosłownie setki voice-overów i narracji zarówno dla radia konsorcjalnego, jak i międzynarodowego przemysłu książek audio.

Geoffrey Giuliano has been a professional actor from the age of twelve. Earning a Master's degree in Acting/Directing in 1976 Giuliano went on to work extensively in the theatre as well as doing literally hundreds of voice overs and narrations for both syndicated radio and within the international audio book industry. Geoffrey now works almost exclusively as an actor in film and television.

Giuliano is also the author of some thirty internationally bestselling books on the Beatles, John Lennon and other iconic musicians of the 1960's including 'The Beatles / A Celebration',' John Lennon My Brother', 'Dark Horse / The Life & Art Of George Harrison', 'Blackbird / The Life & Times Of Paul McCartney', The Beatles Album / Thirty Years Of Music & Memorabilia', 'The Rolling Stones Album / Thirty Years Of Music & Memorabilia', 'The Lost Beatles Interviews', 'Behind Blue Eye's / The Life Of Pete Townshend', 'The Lost John Lennon Interviews', 'John Lennon & Paul McCartney / Behind The Myth', 'Things We Said Today / Conversations With The Beatles','Glass Onion / The Beatles In Their Own Words',' Lennon In America / Based On The Lost John Lennon Diaries 1971-1980' and 'Revolver / The Secret Life Of The Beatles amongst them. In 2005 his book, 'Paint It Black' / The Murder Of Brian Jones' was made into a feature film by Stephen Wooly entitled, 'Stoned / The Wild & Wicked World Of Brian Jones.'

Geoffrey is also a veteran journalist writing for literally dozens of the high profile newspapers and magazines including The Sunday People, The Daily Mail, The News Of The World, The Mail On Sunday, Playgirl and Rolling Stone.

In late 2008 Geoffrey Giuliano founded Icon Books and G2 Media Arts to market his extensive backlist of newly updated books as well as publish new literary and audio works. He is the father of his business partner, Avalon Giuliano. Finally, he is a noted graphic designer, singer songwriter and visual artist. Today he makes his home in Bangkok and is the father of a young son, Eden Garret Giuliano born in 2007. Geoffrey is also a longtime advocate of ethical vegetarianism, animal rights, a student of Vedic philosophy and a vocal advocate of personal freedom and consciousness exploration.
data.name: Geoffrey Giuliano

data.biography: Jerry Hardin (born November 20, 1929) is an American actor. Over a career spanning more than five decades, he has had hundreds of film, television, and theater credits. Hardin is perhaps best known for his recurring role as Deep Throat on The X-Files. He is the father of actress Melora Hardin and producer Shawn Hardin.
data.name: Jerry Hardin

data.biography: Andrew Brooke is an English actor. He is best known for playing Ashley in the Channel 4 series PhoneShop for three series. He has appeared in the movies such as Sherlock Holmes in 2009, The Bank Job and Children of Men. His many television appearances include: After Life, Da Vinci's Demons, The IT Crowd, The Inbetweeners, The Mark Steel Lectures, Doctor Who, Pulling, How Not to Live Your Life, The Bible, Law & Order: UK, My Family, Collision, EastEnders, Silent Witness and No Signal.[citation needed] He also produced Escape of the Artful Dodger and One Way Ticket.
data.name: Andrew Brooke

data.biography:
Off Jumpol Adulkittiporn is a Thai actor, model, singer, and host signed under GMMTV. He holds a bachelor's degree from the Faculty of Information and Communication Technology at Silpakorn University. He got his start in the entertainment industry in 2013 as one of the hosts of Bang Channel's program "Five Live Fresh." He made his acting debut that same year, playing a guest role in the series "Hormones." He got his first lead role in the series "Room Alone" the following year.

Off gained prominence for playing Pick in "Senior Secret Love: Puppy Honey" (2016) and its respective sequel alongside Atthaphan Phunsawat (Gun). The strong chemistry between the two led them to host web programs and star in the series "Theory of Love" (2019). Together, Off and Gun received numerous "Best Couple" awards from award-giving bodies such as the Maya Awards (2018, 2019) and the LINE TV Awards (2019, 2020).

Outside his acting career, Off owns the clothing brand Land of Something and a studio called Never Normal.
data.name: Jumpol Adulkittiporn
จุมพล อดุลกิตติพร

data.biography:
钟朋·阿卢迪吉朋（จุมพล อดุลกิตติพร），昵称Off，1991年1月20日出生于泰国曼谷，泰国男演员、主持人，毕业于泰国艺术大学信息与通信技术学院，现为GMMTV旗下艺人。

2013年参演校园剧《荷尔蒙》进入演艺圈，2014年主持综艺节目《Five Live Fresh》并签约GMMTV。2016年参演《秘恋之我亲爱的狗狗》系列剧集获得关注，2019年凭借同性校园剧《爱情理论》人气提升。2021年主演悬疑爱情剧《他不是我》并参与演唱OST《站在自己这边》，2022年参与音乐作品《吸引力法则》录制。2023年主演爱情剧《丛林猎爱》及《料理情缘》。2024年凭借家庭情感剧《十年后的电影票》提名第28届亚洲电视大奖最佳男配角。2025年主演同志爱情剧《倦怠综合征》及喜剧《分手服务》。此外，创建服装品牌Land of Something及工作室Never Normal。
data.name: 钟朋·阿卢迪吉朋

data.biography:
Jumpol Adulkittiporn, amplamente conhecido como Off, é um experiente ator, apresentador e modelo tailandês sob o selo da GMMTV. Ele é graduado pela Faculdade de Tecnologia da Informação e Comunicação da Universidade Silpakorn. Sua entrada na indústria ocorreu em 2013 como apresentador do programa "Five Live Fresh", estreando como ator no mesmo ano em "Hormones".

Off alcançou o estrelato mundial ao interpretar Pick na série "Senior Secret Love: Puppy Honey" (2016), onde iniciou sua icônica parceria com Gun Atthaphan. Juntos, consolidaram o fenômeno OffGun, estrelando sucessos aclamados como "Theory of Love" (2019), "Not Me" (2021), "Cooking Crush" (2023) e, mais recentemente, protagonizando "Burnout Syndrome" (2025). Reconhecido por seu estilo e senso de moda, Off é o fundador da marca de roupas Land of Something e proprietário do estúdio Never Normal.
data.name: Off Jumpol Adulkittiporn
Ngạo Thế Đan Thần
data.overview: Trên đại lục Thần Khải, Thẩm Tường bị coi là phế vật vì sinh ra đã mang khiếm khuyết không có linh mạch. Quyết tâm khai thông linh mạch, hắn một mình dấn thân vào hiểm địa tìm thuốc, nào ngờ lại ngã xuống vực sâu Tiên Ma Nhai, tình cờ cứu được hai nữ tử thần bí là Thần nữ Bạch U U và Ma nữ Tô Mị Dao. Hai nàng lập khế ước máu cùng Thẩm Tường, giúp hắn thức tỉnh thần mạch nghịch thiên, đồng thời truyền thụ thần công vô thượng và tuyệt kỹ luyện đan siêu phàm. Nhờ đó, Thẩm Tường nhanh chóng quật khởi trên con đường võ đạo.

data.biography:
Lucas Hedges (born December 12, 1996) is an American actor. A son of filmmaker Peter Hedges, he studied theater at the University of North Carolina School of the Arts. Hedges began his acting career with a supporting role in Wes Anderson's comedy-drama Moonrise Kingdom (2012). He had his breakthrough in 2016 playing a sardonic teenager in Kenneth Lonergan's drama Manchester by the Sea, which earned him a nomination for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor. Hedges then starred as an aggressive youth in an off-Broadway production of Yen and had supporting roles in the coming-of-age film Lady Bird and the drama Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri in 2017.

In 2018, Hedges played the lead role of a teenager forced into a gay conversion therapy program in Boy Erased, which earned him a nomination for the Golden Globe Award for Best Actor in a Drama. He also made his Broadway debut in a revival of Lonergan's drama The Waverly Gallery in the same year. In 2023, he starred in a West End theatre production of Brokeback Mountain.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Lucas Hedges, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Lucas Hedges

data.biography:
Lucas Hedges (* 12. Dezember 1996 in Brooklyn, New York City) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler. Er spielte Rollen in Filmen wie Labor Day, The Zero Theorem, Grand Budapest Hotel, Kill the Messenger oder Manchester by the Sea.

Quelle: Wikipedia

卢卡斯·赫奇斯，美国演员，1996年12月12日出生于纽约州布鲁克林高地，母亲是诗人和演员苏珊·布鲁斯，父亲是奥斯卡提名编剧兼导演彼得·赫奇斯，为家中第二子。他有一位哥哥名为赛门。他目前在北卡罗来纳州艺术学院学习戏剧表演。

　　卢卡斯·赫奇斯因出演《月升王国》《告密者》《海边的曼彻斯特》而广为人知，更凭借《海边的曼彻斯特》获得了独立精神奖最佳男配角、美国演员工会奖最佳男配角和奥斯卡金像奖最佳男配角提名，让他成为有史以来获得这多类提名的八位最年轻男演员之一。 2017他将会在葛莉塔·洁薇的电影处女座《伯德夫人》和马丁·麦克唐纳德的电影《三块广告牌》担任主角。
data.name: 卢卡斯·赫奇斯

data.biography: Lucas Hedges (12 de Diciembre, 1996) es un actor estadounidense. Conocido por sus roles en Moonrise Kingdom (2012) de Wes Anderson, el crimen biográfico Kill the Messenger (2014), Lady Bird (2017) de Greta Gerwig, y el drama Manchester by the Sea (2016), por la cual consiguió una nominación a los Premios Oscar.

Lucas Hedges (12 de Diciembre, 1996) es un actor estadounidense. Conocido por sus roles en Moonrise Kingdom (2012) de Wes Anderson, el crimen biográfico Kill the Messenger (2014), Lady Bird (2017) de Greta Gerwig, y el drama Manchester by the Sea (2016), por la cual consiguió una nominación a los Premios Oscar.

盧卡斯·赫奇斯，美國演員，1996 年 12 月 12 日出生於紐約州布魯克林高地，母親是詩人和演員蘇珊·布魯斯，父親是奧斯卡提名編劇兼導演彼得·赫奇斯，為家中第二子。他有一位哥哥名為賽門。他目前在北卡羅來納州藝術學院學習戲劇表演。

盧卡斯·赫奇斯因出演《小學雞私奔記》《洩密者的一天》《海邊的曼徹斯特》而廣為人知，更憑藉《海邊的曼徹斯特》獲得了獨立精神獎最佳男配角、美國演員工會獎最佳男配角和奧斯卡金像獎最佳男配角提名，讓他成為有史以來獲得這多類提名的八位最年輕男演員之一。

2017 他將會在葛莉塔·潔薇的電影處女座《伯德夫人》和馬丁·麥克唐納德的電影《三塊廣告牌》擔任主角。
data.name: 盧卡斯海吉斯

data.biography:
Lucas Hedges, né le 12 décembre 1996 à New York, est un acteur américain.

Lucas Hedges est le fils du réalisateur Peter Hedges et de l'actrice et poétesse Susan Bruce. Il grandit à Brooklyn et fréquente une école privée d'arts. Repéré par un directeur de casting lors d'un spectacle scolaire (Nicholas Nickleby), il commence sa carrière au cinéma par un petit rôle dans le film Moonrise Kingdom de Wes Anderson.

À la fin de sa dernière année de lycée, il tourne dans Manchester by the Sea, réalisé par un ami de son père Kenneth Lonergan. Dans le film, il joue Patrick, un adolescent élevé par son oncle (Casey Affleck) après le décès de son père. Sa performance est particulièrement remarquée et il est nommé pour l'Oscar du meilleur acteur dans un second rôle, finalement remporté par Mahershala Ali dans Moonlight. Hedges choisit alors d'abandonner ses études de théâtre à l'université de Caroline du Nord pour se consacrer à sa carrière.

Après avoir vu Manchester by the Sea, la réalisatrice Greta Gerwig lui propose de jouer dans son prochain film Lady Bird, lui présentant les rôles de Danny et Kyle, deux petits amis de l'héroïne. Hedges choisit le rôle de Danny, dont il se sent « plus proche ». Il est à l'affiche d'un autre succès critique de l'année 2017, Three Billboards : Les Panneaux de la vengeance, où il interprète le fils de Mildred Hayes (Frances McDormand). La même année, il tourne dans le film Ben Is Back, au côté de Julia Roberts et sous la direction de son père, ainsi que dans Boy Erased de Joel Edgerton, qui aborde le sujet des thérapies de conversion en partant de la véritable histoire de Garrard Conley qui, à dix-neuf ans, s'est vu contraint de suivre une telle thérapie censée le rendre hétérosexuel.

Billie Catherine Lourd (born July 17, 1992) is an American actress, best known for starring as Chanel #3 in the Fox horror comedy series Scream Queens (2015–2016) and for her roles in the FX horror anthology series American Horror Story (2017–present). She also appears as Lieutenant Connix in the Star Wars sequel trilogy (2015–2019). Lourd is the only child of actress Carrie Fisher.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Billie Lourd, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Billie Lourd

data.biography:
Billie Catherine Lourd 1992. július 17-én látta meg a napvilágot Los Angelesben. Ismertségét leginkább szüleinek köszönheti, édesanyja Carrie Fisher, édesapja Bryan Lourd mind a ketten nagy hírnévnek örvendenek a sztárvilágban. 2014-ben fejezte be tanulmányait a New York University intézményében, ahol vallást és pszichológiát tanult.

Édesanyja a Star Wars filmek sztárja, s ezen kívül számos filmes és sorozatbeli karakter megtestesítője, Carrie Fisher. Édesapja Bryan Lourd pedig szintén ismert, az amerikai Creative Artists Agency dolgozója, tehetségkutató ügynök. A szülők nem rejtegették Billiet, anyja több alkalommal is végigvonult vele a vörös szőnyegen, nem próbálta óvni a lányát a sztárvilágtól, sőt, ahogy Billie egyre idősebb lett, egyengetni kezdte karrierrjét is.

Billie Catherine Lourd (* 17. Juli 1992 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Billie Lourd wurde im Juli 1992 in Los Angeles im US-Bundesstaat Kalifornien geboren. Ihre Eltern sind die 2016 verstorbene Schauspielerin Carrie Fisher und der Talentscout Bryan Lourd. Sie ist die Enkelin der ebenfalls 2016 verstorbenen Schauspielerin Debbie Reynolds und des Sängers Eddie Fisher; außerdem ist sie die Nichte von Todd Fisher, Joely Fisher und Tricia Leigh Fisher. Lourd studierte Religionswissenschaft und Psychologie an der New York University und schloss ihr Studium im Jahr 2014 ab.

Im Juni 2014 berichtete The Sun, dass Lourd eine Rolle in dem 2015 erscheinenden Star Wars: Das Erwachen der Macht erhalten solle. Kurz nach Bekanntgabe wurde spekuliert, ob Lourd eine jüngere Version von Leia Organa, die ihre Mutter bereits gespielt hatte, verkörpern werde. Lourd verneinte dies. Schließlich war sie als Lieutenant Connix zu sehen, die sie auch in den darauffolgenden Teilen Star Wars: Die letzten Jedi und Star Wars: Der Aufstieg Skywalkers verkörpert.

Von September 2015 bis Dezember 2016 hatte Billie Lourd eine Hauptrolle als Sadie Swenson in der Horror-Comedy-Fernsehserie Scream Queens inne. 2017 spielte sie in der siebten Staffel der Anthologie-Serie American Horror Story mit. 2018 war sie neben Emma Roberts und Ansel Elgort in der Filmbiografie Billionaire Boys Club zu sehen. 2018 und 2019 übernahm sie in der achten und der neunten Staffel von American Horror Story weitere Hauptrollen.

Im Jahr 2020 bekam Lourd gemeinsam mit Austen Rydell einen Sohn. Das Paar heiratete im März 2022.
Wang Zu Yi is an actor from Mainland China, born in Dalian, Liaoning province.  He graduated from Shanghai Institute of Visual Arts.
data.name: Wang Zuyi

data.biography:
佟心竹，北斗企鹅工作室 配音演员，艺名“C小调”，1992年12月8日出生于北京市朝阳区，毕业于深圳大学，中国配音演员，8082Audio配音导演。

2015年为《仙剑客栈》系列游戏配音。2016年，参与日本动画电影《你的名字》普通话版、网络剧《器灵》、游戏《300英雄》《影之刃2》等作品的配音。此外，担任游戏《黑神话：悟空》的配音导演。
data.name: 佟心竹

data.biography:
佟心竹，北鬥企鵝工作室 配音演員，藝名“C 小調”，1992 年 12 月 8 日出生於北京市朝陽區，畢業於深圳大學，中國配音演員，8082Audio 配音導演。

2015 年為《仙劍客棧》系列遊戲配音。2016 年，參與日本動畫電影《你的名字》普通話版、網絡劇《器靈》、遊戲《300 英雄》《影之刃 2》等作品的配音。此外，擔任遊戲《黑神話：悟空》的配音導演。
data.name: 佟心竹

data.biography:
Gli esordi televisivi vedono Max negli stessi anni in rotocalchi di moda, attualità e spettacolo come Dolce casa, Scopritalia e Telefax, su circuiti privati. Nel 2001 approda a Rai 2 dove partecipa alla trasmissione Superconvenscion. La banda Bertolino-Panicucci porta fortuna al comico che, in questa e nell'edizione successiva, Convenscion a colori, lancia alcune delle sue più riuscite imitazioni come Alberto Sordi, Luciano Rispoli, Adriano Celentano, Franco Califano e Michele Santoro

(wikipedia)
data.name: Max Tortora

data.overview: Tống Ẩn nhận lệnh điều tra vụ án sản xuất và buôn bán "Cực Lạc Cao". Trong quá trình phá án, anh nhận được sự giúp đỡ của hiệp khách Dạ Sát, đại phu Yến Vân Thăng và dược sư Tố Nga. Nhờ vào những trận chiến ngoan cường và sự hy sinh dũng cảm, họ đã xé toang tấm bình phong che chở cho tên tội phạm cầm đầu Bạch Khải Niên, mang lại sự bình yên cho người dân.
data.title: Vô Quy Khách
